mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms ( user_uuid, category_no, room_title, room_description, max_users, now_users, room_password, room_notice, room_private, room_premium, room_thumbnail, expired_at ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}::uuid, #{categoryNo}, #{roomTitle}, #{roomDescription}, #{maxUser}, #{nowUser}, #{roomPassword}, #{roomNotice}, #{roomPrivate}, #{roomPremium}, #{roomThumbnail}, #{expiredAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT room_no AS "roomNo", user_uuid AS "userUuid", category_no AS "categoryNo", room_title AS "roomTitle", room_description AS "roomDescription", max_users AS "maxUser", now_users AS "nowUser", room_password AS "roomPassword", room_notice AS "roomNotice", room_private AS "roomPrivate", room_premium AS "roomPremium", room_thumbnail AS "roomThumbnail", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt", expired_at AS "expiredAt" FROM rooms WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_participants ( user_uuid, room_no, camera_status, mic_status ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}::uuid, #{roomNo}, #{cameraStatus}, #{micStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM room_participants WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid}::uuid AND room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE rooms SET room_notice = #{roomNotice}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
UPDATE rooms SET room_notice = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
mapper.select: SELECT part_no AS "partNo", user_uuid AS "userUuid", room_no AS "roomNo", camera_status AS "cameraStatus", mic_status AS "micStatus" FROM room_participants WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
